config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.nodes: WITH __value AS event MERGE (n:CPGNode {id: event.id}) ON CREATE SET n.created_at = event.event_time SET n += coalesce(event.properties, {}), n.file_id = event.file_id, n.file_path = event.file_path, n.repo = event.repo, n.commit_sha = event.commit_sha, n.run_id = event.run_id, n.node_type = event.node_type, n.scope_path = event.scope_path, n.lineno = event.lineno, n.col_offset = event.col_offset, n.end_lineno = event.end_lineno, n.end_col_offset = event.end_col_offset, n.placeholder = false, n.updated_at = event.event_time
config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.edges: WITH __value AS event MERGE (a:CPGNode {id: event.source_id}) ON CREATE SET a.placeholder = true, a.created_at = event.event_time MERGE (b:CPGNode {id: event.target_id}) ON CREATE SET b.placeholder = true, b.created_at = event.event_time MERGE (a)-[r:CPG_EDGE {id: event.id}]->(b) ON CREATE SET r.created_at = event.event_time SET r.edge_type = event.edge_type, r.file_id = event.file_id, r.file_path = event.file_path, r.repo = event.repo, r.commit_sha = event.commit_sha, r.run_id = event.run_id, r += coalesce(event.properties, {}), r.updated_at = event.event_time
config.name: cpg-neo4j-sink
